principles: Owner and configured administrators control setup and dashboard configuration.
The bot role must remain above every role it manages.
Tryout staff assign ranks only through the bot and never receive Manage Roles.
Trial referees cannot approve challenge results.
Ticket participants see only their active private ticket.
Transcript, staff log and review channels are staff-only.
Member-facing selectors grant only self-assignable language and ping roles.

dangerousPermissions.administrator: Bot only in the dedicated test server during setup; production should use least privilege.
